name: unraid-modernui
description: Clean, flat, responsive theme for Unraid 7.x. v0.5.0: complete /Docker rebuild — Lit page with built-in folders + tags, search/filters, bulk actions, per-row CPU/RAM/VDisk/MAC stats, folder sum totals, async check-for-updates that doesn't block on 30+ container hosts.

scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:php
